meaning: adj.麝香的,有麝香味的,麝香似的
examples: She dabbed a drop of the musky perfume behind each ear.
He was conscious of the faint, musky aroma of aftershave.
The heavy fur on its neck felt like a poodle's. It had the powerful musky smell of a wild animal.
The most posh restaurant in town is a Cajun place called The Double Musky.
The earthy, musky perfume of this subterranean delicacy has long been rumored to possess aphrodisiacal powers.
